ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the course is worth */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "semester_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester and year the course is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_semester_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_year_id") REFERENCES semester_years ("semester_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_title" TEXT /* Title of the discussion topic */,
  "topic_type" TEXT /* Type of the topic (e.g., announcement, question, discussion) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the topic (e.g., open, closed, pinned) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the topic */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the topic has been viewed */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the topic belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the entry is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the entry */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the entry */,
  "entry_type" TEXT /* Type of the entry (e.g., post, question, announcement) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the entry (e.g., active, deleted, edited) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the entry */,
  "parent_entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent entry if this entry is a reply */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the entry has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the entry has received */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the entry has been viewed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_parent_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry the reply is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "reply_type" TEXT /* Type of the reply (e.g., comment, answer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reply (e.g., active, deleted, edited) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reply */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the reply has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the reply has received */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the reply has been viewed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reply was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, teaching assistant) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the user is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the user enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., post, reply, edit, delete) */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, reply, edit, delete) */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object (e.g., entry_id, topic_id) related to the activity */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., entry, topic, reply) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semester_years" (
  "semester_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester and year entry */,
  "semester_year" TEXT /* Description of semester and year (e.g., Fall 2019) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_year_id")
)
